hook.summary: A hand icon taps on colored buses to clear a traffic jam and pick up matching passengers.
hook.visual_action: A finger taps a green bus, which drives to a parking bay to collect green stick-figure passengers.
hook.text_overlay: Don't even try to solve this, YOU CAN'T

scene_flow: Introduction of the bus-matching mechanic with a hand pointer.
Fast-paced gameplay showing multiple buses clearing the jam.
The player fails to clear the level, resulting in a large 'FAIL' overlay.
End card display with the game title and a call to action.
on_screen_text: Don't even try to solve this, YOU CAN'T
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy color-matching puzzles and logic challenges.
